ab: nokapepnezak am, na yangay yamen no sinsi do panitanitan so omalalam, namen mian do asdesdepan am ya namen minazabi a manazang so kipo.
ch: 今天早上，老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: namen somdep rana do panitanitan so omalalam am, maniring o sinsi am “ya mian do kananman tamo eya am miasasalap, do teyrala rana ori am volavolay, to tanio ngonongi o kapilingalingay takamo.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，靠裡面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: ko mamogaw no volay ang, so ji ko nimangai do dang a manita.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: aro o nimacita ko a miasasalap, somalasalap sira do toos, macita ko pa a o totoo a mitkeh do tonga no kayo.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: karoan no omalalam am mian so panganpen a ka no baka a ka no kokoman so tao, ji ko pa nimakacita so akman so sang a omalalam, ko macita rana siciaraw ya am ko na masaray.
ch: 動物園裡有白鼻心、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: ya aro o ko nisiva a siasing, ta ko ipacita jira ama a ka ni ina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: sipisa am macizeza ko jira ama a ka ni ina a mai do jia.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
